title: Invite a Buyer to Your Dossier
description: Get your buyer into the loop without endless texts. Here's how to invite them in one tap.
voiceover_script: Hi, I'm Dossie. Once you've opened a dossier, invite your buyer so they can see exactly where the deal stands. Open the file, tap the buyer's name, and send the invite. They get a private client view with milestones, deadlines, and signed documents. No more calls asking where things are. They check the dossier. You stay focused on the next deal.
